summary.coverage_percent: N/A — coverage report did not emit a summary JSON; detailed per-file coverage available via vitest run --coverage

still_failing.test: executeAgentRun > shows 'Opening terminal...' toast and error when terminalSender is null after 500ms wait
still_failing.reason: BUG-004 (Low, deferred) — real polling loop exceeds Vitest 5s timeout. Requires fake timers fix.

backend_suite.note: agent-launcher.test.js failures are pre-existing SPACE_NOT_FOUND issues (spaceId='default' not found in test-server with UUID space). Not introduced by settings-bar. spaceManager.test.js: 1 pass. Other test files are integration tests not run by default npm test.

performance.note: Not applicable — feature is pure frontend CSS normalization with no new API endpoints

security.advisory_detail: AgentLauncherMenu uses inline style={{}} for menu position (top, left). This is a CLAUDE.md violation (no inline styles). No security risk but flags a coding standards breach.

AgentSettingsToggle.test.tsx > applies active classes when panel is open

test_cases.description: executeAgentRun sends cliCommand+CR to PTY sender
test_cases.test_ref: useAppStore.test.ts > executeAgentRun > sends the CLI command + newline via terminalSender when connected
test_cases.notes: BUG-003 RESOLVED. Test assertion updated to cmd + '\r'. Passes in cycle 2.

test_cases.description: executeAgentRun null-sender path completes within timeout
test_cases.test_ref: useAppStore.test.ts > executeAgentRun > shows Opening terminal... toast and error when terminalSender is null after 500ms wait
test_cases.notes: BUG-004 still open (deferred Low). Real polling loop exceeds 5s Vitest default timeout. Requires vi.useFakeTimers() fix. Does not block merge gate.
